search_signals.author: unknown
search_signals.text: 📰 MARKET UPDATE Just how profitable is betting on #Bitcoin's price on #Polymarket? 3 linked wallets (likely owned by the same person) started trading on Feb 1. In just one month, they made $2.35M in profit. They only bet on whether $BTC goes up or down (sometimes also on $ETH and $SOL). That’s insanely profitable.

search_signals.author: unknown
search_signals.text: Literally zero value from crypto innovation is going to retail investors. Bitcoin will eventually crash and burn. Ethereum will be used but price is overvalued. Stablecoins will have their own chains. Prediction market value goes straight to Kalshi and Polymarket.

search_signals.author: OpacityNetwork
search_signals.text: Hot take: Prediction markets will evolve into something resembling insurance. Say you want bitcoin quantum insurance (admin resolution i think is fine). Only a prediction market can price the risk at scale. One pool pays yield to another until the policy resolves. Composes nicely with looping. In the quoted idea it’s even cleaner where the sr traunche pays premiums to the jr traunche to take losses first.
